prestazioni: APR Stage 3+ turbo upgrade for the 2.5L TFSI CDL engine, featuring a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and 63mm compressor inducer, paired with APR’s CNC-machined intake manifold and upgraded fuel system (Bosch 1000cc injectors, APR high-pressure fuel pump, and upgraded fuel lines) to support 550+ HP on 98 RON fuel with a custom APR ECU calibration

Wavetrac limited-slip differential with 40% preload for the 8P RS3’s Haldex-based quattro system, paired with an upgraded Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (P/N 3000 950 030) and South Bend Clutch Stage 3+ organic/ceramic hybrid disc (P/N SB8P-3000) to handle increased torque without drivetrain failure

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and low-speed compression), custom-valved for the RS3 8P’s 5-link rear suspension geometry, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (P/N 51660) and polyurethane subframe bushings (034 Motorsport P/N 034-04-1100) to eliminate torque steer and improve turn-in response
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit for the 8P RS3, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with aggressive 30mm flares, rear quarter panels with integrated diffuser, and a custom 3D-printed rear bumper lip to accommodate the KW Clubsport coilover setup while maintaining OEM+ fitment

OEM+ RS3-specific carbon fiber engine cover (079 103 641 A) with custom laser-etched APR logo, paired with a carbon fiber strut brace (034 Motorsport P/N 034-01-1001) and a custom aluminum oil cap (Forge Motorsport P/N FMOC10) with engraved CDL engine code

Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5 ET35 (front) and 19x11 ET40 (rear) wheels in matte bronze, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35 R19 front, 295/30 R19 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (P/N 1N0 615 123 G) and 4-piston rear calipers (P/N 1K0 615 425 AD) with 380mm front and 356mm rear two-piece floating rotors (DBA 5000 Series)
